prediction.reasoning: Based on AXP's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually, I estimate a daily volatility of ~1.3%. Over 22 trading days, this translates to potential price movements of ±4.7% (50% CI), ±9.0% (80% CI), and ±11.7% (90% CI). The slight positive point estimate reflects the general long-term upward trend of the broad market, though short-term movements are largely unpredictable.
